from_stage: TRACKER-1 SCHEMA AND STATE SEED IMPLEMENTATION
required_preconditions: Do not implement boot/stage gates in TRACKER-2.

Stop after writing TRACKER-2 receipt and handoff.
next_command: Continue MetaBlooms from /mnt/data/Metablooms_OS. Load TRACKER-1 schema/state seed receipt and handoff.
